method: Glucose42 with rooted spanning-arborescence connectivity and sequential-counter cardinality on the triangular lattice (parity-preserving placements); disjoint from the main solver's CaDiCaL + CEGAR + placement_runner.

results.detail: n=2: Glucose confirms a(2)=4 (SAT at k=4, UNSAT at k=3)
n=3: Glucose confirms a(3)=6 (SAT at k=6, UNSAT at k=5)
n=4: Glucose confirms a(4)=9 (SAT at k=9, UNSAT at k=8)
n=5: Glucose confirms a(5)=12 (SAT at k=12, UNSAT at k=11)
n=6: Glucose confirms a(6)=17 (SAT at k=17, UNSAT at k=16)
n=7: Glucose confirms a(7)=22 (SAT at k=22, UNSAT at k=21)
n=8: Glucose confirms a(8)=27 (SAT at k=27, UNSAT at k=26)
n=9: Glucose confirms a(9)=31 (SAT at k=31, UNSAT at k=30)
n=10: Glucose confirms a(10)=39 (SAT at k=39, UNSAT at k=38)
